blended.narrative: Poley Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.1 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,313 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.2" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
